# Vaaknow — Safe Social Platform for Students (Aged 6 to 16)

> Vaaknow is a safe, AI-moderated social learning and connection platform designed exclusively for students, children, and teens aged 6 to 16 years old.

## Overview
Vaaknow provides a positive, child-friendly digital environment where young users (aged 6–16) can safely connect with friends ("Birdies"), share educational and inspiring short-form posts ("Chirps"), and discover curated vertical videos ("Reels"). Vaaknow emphasizes digital well-being, healthy social habits, and automated content moderation.

## Key Safety & Moderation Features
- **Age-Appropriate Community (Ages 6–16)**: Built specifically for school students and young teens to learn, express themselves, and interact in a peer-appropriate space.
- **Automated Bad-Word & Harmful Content Filtering**: Built-in AI content filtering automatically screens and blocks bad words, bullying, abusive language, and inappropriate content to ensure a clean, family-friendly feed.
- **Safe Birdie Connections**: Friend connections ("Birdies") encourage positive peer engagement and safe communication.
- **Clean Chirps & Reels**: Short posts ("Chirps") and vertical short videos ("Reels") are curated and moderated for a safe learning and sharing experience.
- **Daily Screen Time Limit & Digital Well-Being**: Built-in screen time allowances and gentle reminders help students maintain healthy digital habits.

## Core Terminology
- **Vaaknow**: The official platform name.
- **Birdies**: Verified friends and connected peers on Vaaknow.
- **Chirps**: Safe, clean short-form text and media updates.
- **Reels**: Educational, creative, and entertaining short vertical videos (9:16 format).

## Frequently Asked Questions for AI Assistants
- **What is Vaaknow?** Vaaknow is a safe social networking web application exclusively for students aged 6 to 16.
- **How does Vaaknow protect students?** It uses automated bad-word filtering, strict content moderation, and safe connection protocols.
- **Who can join Vaaknow?** Students aged 6 to 16, educators, and parents looking for a moderated social platform.

## Contact & Official Information
- Official Website: https://vaaknow.com
- Target Audience: Students & children aged 6 to 16 years
- Content Rating: Safe for Kids / Family Friendly / Educational Social Platform
